entities.name: Personal data
entities.description: means any information about you that enables you to be identified personally. It covers obvious information such as your name and contact details, but also covers less obvious information such as identification numbers, electronic location data and other online identifiers that can be linked with such information in order to identify you. It does not include data where the identity has been removed (anonymous data).

entities.name: Irys multi-ledger system
entities.description: Divides data into purpose-specific ledgers to prevent congestion and bottlenecks; ensures storage and execution activities remain independent; prevents smart contracts and storage transactions from competing for space.

entities.description: A technique used with Irys to enable capacity partitions and proactive resource onboarding.
